title: Data Classification is now available by default for some workspaces with the compliance security profile enabled
body: [Data Classification](/aws/en/data-governance/unity-catalog/data-classification) is now available by default for workspaces with the [compliance security profile](/aws/en/security/privacy/security-profile) enabled, and either HIPAA, HITRUST, PCI-DSS, or FedRAMP Moderate controls or no specific compliance standard selected.
